contents:
# Taiwan detects 10 PLA aircraft sorties crossing median line into ADIZ

## Overview
Taiwan Ministry of National Defense detected 10 sorties of PLA aircraft up until 6 a.m. UTC+8 on Wednesday. 9 out of 10 crossed the median line into northern, southwestern, and eastern ADIZ. ROC Armed Forces monitored and responded.[1][2]

## Details
The MND shared the update via post on X. 11 PLAN vessels and 1 official ship remained also detected operating around Taiwan. Specific units or equipment details did not stand as provided. This incident preceded the April 30 detection. 1 sortie did not cross the median line.[1][2]

**Location**: Taiwan northern, southwestern, eastern ADIZ

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @MoNDefense, which covers Taiwan Ministry National Defense PLA aircraft ADIZ daily. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following Taiwan Ministry National Defense PLA aircraft ADIZ daily will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
